question: When was Salem Balhamer Holding Group established?
expected_answer: The business was launched in 1979 in the trading sector. The Holding Group was formally established in 2013, consolidating more than 20 companies under one umbrella.
generated_answer: The business was launched in 1979 in the trading sector. The Holding Group was formally established in 2013, consolidating 20+ companies under one umbrella.
retrieved_contexts:
['## CHUNK 27: COMPREHENSIVE FAQ (For Chatbot Training)

**Q: When was Salem Balhamer Holding Group established?**
A: The business was launched in 1979 in the trading sector. The Holding Group was formally established in 2013, consolidating 20+ companies under one umbrella. The Group's heritage spans nearly five decades.

**Q: Who founded the company?**
A: Sheikh Salem Ahmed Balhamer is the founder and Chairman of the Board.

**Q: Who is the current CEO?**
A: Ahmed Salem Balhamer, son of the founder.

**Q: Where is the headquarters?**
A: Balhamer Business Gate, Floor 20, Al Ashriah Street, Dammam, Eastern Province, Saudi Arabia.

**Q: How many companies are in the Group?**
A: More than 20 companies operating across various strategic sectors including industrial, trading, contracting, real estate, training, services, and investment.

**Q: What sectors does the Group operate in?**
A: Six main sectors: Industrial, Trading, Contracting, Real Estate Development & Investment, Training & Education, and Services (IT). The Group also has Investment activities and operates in entertainment, oil & gas, healthcare, and legal services.

**Q: What products does the industrial sector manufacture?**
A: Plastic pipes and fittings (PVC, UPVC, CPVC, HDPE), thermal insulation panels (XPS/EPS), plastic containers and packaging, hordy, decoration panels, and metal fabrication/galvanizing products.

**Q: How many factories does the Group operate?**
A: 6 factories in Dammam (2nd Industrial City) and Jubail Industrial City.

**Q: Which countries do you export to?**
A: Over 30 countries across GCC, Middle East, Asia, Africa, and Europe. Operations in KSA (all regions), Bahrain, Egypt, Yemen, and solar product distribution in UAE and Oman.

**Q: What quality standards do products meet?**
A: SASO (Saudi), ASTM (American), DIN (German), BS (British) standards. Factories hold ISO 9002 and ISO 9001:2015 certifications.

**Q: Is the Group aligned with Saudi Vision 2030?**
A: Yes, across all sectors — industrial modernization, supporting non-oil GDP, water conservation (Qatra certification), human capital development (ICON Training), clean energy investment (Valoe solar JV), digital transformation, and community development.

**Q: What HVAC services do you offer?**
A: Design, supply, installation, and maintenance of integrated HVAC systems including chilled water, VRV/VRF, concealed units, package and split systems. Also technical consultancy, feasibility studies, and project supervision. Over 52,161 units installed across 5,701+ projects in 28+ years.

**Q: What construction services does the contracting company provide?**
A: Construction & concrete buildings, infrastructure, electromechanical works, metal constructions, HVAC, finishing/fitting, landscape works, maintenance & operation, and transportation/equipment services.

**Q: Do you offer training programs?**
A: Yes, through ICON Training Company — internationally accredited programs in cyber security, management skills, ISO standards, creativity, safety, and Aramco technician qualification. Programs cover oil, gas, electrical, mechanical, air-conditioning, and metallurgical industries.

**Q: What real estate services are available?**
A: Real estate development and marketing, property/facilities management, project management, engineering supervision, real estate valuation, feasibility studies, real estate consultancy, off-plan sales (Wafi), and investment marketing. Operations in KSA, Bahrain, and Egypt with strategic DAMAC partnership.

**Q: What is FABCO thermal insulation?**
A: FABCO Thermal Insulators Factory produces EPS (Expanded Polystyrene) and XPS (Extruded Polystyrene) insulation panels for walls, roofs, blocks, and decorative applications. Products save 35–45% on electricity bills and are exported to 30+ countries. ISO 9001:2015 and SASO certified, fire-resistant per SASO specifications.

**Q: What community initiatives does the Group support?**
A: Five "Sustainable Impact" initiatives (2025): furniture donation to Albir Society families, food container donation to Eta'am Society, electronic device recycling for Ertiqaa Association, orphan training with Benaa Society, and youth business mentorship through "Diwaniya Balhamer." The HVAC division also installs AC for needy families through Tarmem Association.

**Q: Does the Group have partnerships with major organizations?**
A: Yes — Saudi Aramco, Saudi Electricity Company, multiple government ministries, DAMAC Real Estate, Valoe Oyj (Finland), Smakna Company, Saudi Naval Forces, and 35+ multinational brands.

**Q: What is the company's phone number?**
A: +966 138127397

**Q: What awards has the Group received?**
A: Best Place to Work 2024–2025, ISO 9002 and ISO 9001:2015 certifications, National Water Conservation "Qatra" certificate, Ministry of Housing Real Estate Developer Certificate, multiple medals from Arab countries.', '## CHUNK 01: COMPANY IDENTITY & OVERVIEW

**Full Legal Name:** Salem Balhamer Holding Group (Arabic: سالم بالحمر القابضة)
**Type:** Privately held, family-owned conglomerate
**Founded:** Business operations launched in 1979 in the trading sector. Holding Group formally incorporated in 2013.
**Founder & Chairman of the Board:** Sheikh Salem Ahmed Balhamer
**CEO:** Ahmed Salem Balhamer (son of the founder). Ahmed Salem Balhamer holds a Bachelor of Business Administration (BBA, 2000–2004) from Welingkar Institute of Management. He has held leadership roles across FABCO Plastic Factory and Salem Balhamer Plastic Factory before becoming CEO of the Holding Group.
**CFO:** Medhat AlAshi
**Head of Public Relations & Administrative Affairs:** Amani Salem Ahmed Balhamer (daughter of the founder)
**General Manager of Factories:** Badr Bakhshwain
**General Manager of Customer Service & Administrative Support:** Dr. Abdullah Mohammed Al-Baz
**General Manager, HVAC Division:** Salah Al-Banaa

**Headquarters:** Balhamer Business Gate, Floor 20, Al Ashriah Street, Dammam, Eastern Province, Kingdom of Saudi Arabia. PO Box 150, Dammam.
**Phone:** +966 138127397
**Company Size:** 201–500 employees
**Annual Revenue (est.):** $20.1 million (2024, per RocketReach)
**SIC Code:** 671, 67 | **NAICS Code:** 551, 541

**Website:** https://salembalhamer.com/
**New Website:** https://new.salembalhamer.com/
**LinkedIn:** https://www.linkedin.com/company/salem-balhamer-group.

**Industry Classifications:** Mechanical/Industrial Engineering; Real Estate & Investment; Construction; Manufacturing of PVC/CPVC products; Trading; Apartments.

**Certifications & Awards:**
- Best Place to Work certification 2024–2025
- ISO 9002 (FABCO Plastic Factory)
- ISO 9001:2015 (FABCO Thermal Insulators Factory)
- National Water Conservation "Qatra" (Drop) Certificate
- Real Estate Developer Certificate (Ministry of Housing — for Ryadah)
- Multiple medals and certificates from Arab countries

**Brand Tagline:** "We transform ambitious visions into extraordinary success stories, partnering with visionary leaders across diverse sectors to achieve remarkable growth and lasting impact throughout our businesses."

**Number of Subsidiaries:** More than 20 companies operating across various strategic sectors.', '## CHUNK 02: HISTORY & MILESTONES TIMELINE

- **1975:** FABCO Plastic Factory Co. Ltd. established in 2nd Industrial City, Dammam, Eastern Province. Originally focused on PVC pipes and fittings manufacturing.
- **1979:** Salem Balhamer's business operations officially launched in the trading sector.
- **1980s:** Salem Balhamer Real Estate Company Ltd. established by Sheikh Salem Balhamer for real estate development and investment, with operations in KSA, Bahrain, and Egypt.
- **1993:** Salem Balhamer General Contracting Co. Ltd. established as an individual organization by Sheikh Salem bin Ahmed Balhamer. Became a significant driving force in the Kingdom's contracting sector.
- **1994:** AIR ZONE Company (Salem Balhamer HVAC and Maintenance Contracting) commenced operations in the Eastern Province. Also, Salem Balhamer Plastic Factory (BPF) established.
- **1995:** FABCO Plastic Factory acquired by Salem Balhamer (the factory was originally established in 1975).
- **2001:** FABCO Plastic Factory became one of the top industrial tributaries of Salem Balhamer Holding Group.
- **2005:** Al Jubail HIT Factory for Steel Fabrication & Galvanizing established in Third Industrial Area, Jubail.
- **2013:** Salem Balhamer Holding Group formally established as a leading family conglomerate, consolidating 20+ companies under one umbrella.
- **2015:** Salem Balhamer Plastic Containers Factory established in 2nd Industrial City, Dammam. FABCO Thermal Insulators Factory also established (began production in 2016).
- **2016:** FABCO Thermal Insulators Factory begins production of thermal insulation panels.
- **2021 (August):** ICON Advanced Co. Ltd. (fully owned by Salem Balhamer Holding) signed MOU with Valoe Oyj (Finland) for joint venture to build a back-contact solar module manufacturing plant in Saudi Arabia. Planned investment: ~EUR 15 million.
- **2021 (October):** Joint venture company formally established; ICON commenced marketing Valoe's solar products in Saudi Arabia, Dubai, Abu Dhabi, and Oman.
- **2022:** ICON Training Company established. Al Jubail HIT Factory acquired by Salem Balhamer Holding Group. MEPPLUS for Electromechanical Works established.
- **2023 (August):** Thermoforming technology production lines added at plastic containers factory. FABCO HDPE pipe plant commenced operations.
- **2024–2025:** Best Place to Work certification obtained. Group participated in IKTVA 2025 Forum, SABIC 2025, and Big 5 Construct Saudi 2025 exhibitions.
- **2025:** Five strategic community partnership agreements signed under the "Sustainable Impact" initiative. SABIC delegation visited Group factories. Saudi Export-Import Bank delegation visited factories.

**Heritage Note:** Sheikh Salem Ahmed Balhamer passionately conveyed humanitarian values and beliefs about community service to his children and grandchildren, to be inherited from generation to next. The Balhamer family has preserved its heritage in the Saudi market by building a strong base of customers over nearly five decades.']

question: What is the difference between XPS and EPS insulation?
expected_answer: XPS (Extruded Polystyrene) is produced through continuous extrusion, giving it higher density and better moisture resistance. It is recommended for roofs (30+ kg/m³, 12–15cm) and floors (35+ kg/m³). EPS (Expanded Polystyrene) is lighter, easier to install, more flexible, and recommended for walls (25 kg/m³, 10cm) and decorative applications (15–20 kg/m³). Both are produced by FABCO Thermal Insulators Factory.

* EPS has a density of 25 kg/m³, thickness of 10 cm, and is used for wall insulation.

No further information is provided in the context regarding the specific differences between XPS and EPS.

### Vision
To be a leading conglomerate holding company, recognized for its diversified investments and significant contribution to the Kingdom's economy.

### Mission
Salem Balhamer Holding Group seeks to achieve leadership by diversifying investments and expanding in local, regional, and international markets. The Group forms strategic partnerships with local and international partners to provide products and services compatible with local and international quality standards to achieve customer satisfaction, while adhering to social responsibility in various aspects of community, economic, and environmental development.

### Growth & Sustainability Strategy (Key Pillars)
1. **Market Expansion:** Expanding into new sectors while maintaining strength in existing ones; entering new domestic and international markets with a focus on high-growth regions; diversifying distribution channels to include e-commerce alongside traditional methods.
2. **Customer Focus:** Deep understanding of diverse and evolving customer needs; commitment to industry updates and developing products/services that meet local and global quality standards; delivering customized and exceptional customer experiences at competitive prices.
3. **Strategic Partnerships:** Fostering strong partnerships with leading local and international companies; enhancing expertise and resources to boost competitiveness; delivering innovative solutions to support expansion efforts.
4. **Digital Transformation:** Developing a robust digital infrastructure to support operations and businesses; utilizing data and analytics to improve decision-making and operational performance; embracing automation and artificial intelligence to enhance efficiency and reduce costs.
5. **Total Quality Management:** Continuous improvement in operations and product development; forging partnerships for product development and market expansion.

### CEO Ahmed Salem Balhamer's Message
"The success of the Salem Balhamer Holding Group is a result of the policies and values that established our existence, and continued to boost our successes in growth and expansion of the company's horizons, past, present and future. These values and practices remain an indication of our unwavering commitment to conducting our business professionally, responsibly and ethically. Our group has evolved from a successful regional family business to a family business with global capabilities."

"We look forward to continuing our journey to achieve leadership, professionalism and added value to build a promising future in line with the pillars of the Kingdom's Vision 2030 and contribute to building a prosperous economy for an ambitious country and a vibrant society."']
